title: Chain of Thought：让 Claude 先想再答
title_en: Chain of Thought: Make Claude Think Before Answering

body.concept: Chain of Thought (CoT) 是让 Claude 在给出最终答案前，先逐步写出推理过程。这不是装饰——Claude 的推理质量会随着「写出思考」而真实提升，因为每一步输出都会影响下一步的生成。
body.analogy: 就像数学考试要求写解题步骤而不是只写答案。写步骤不只是为了让老师检查——写的过程本身帮你发现计算错误。Claude 也一样：跳步容易出错，写出来就更准。

body_en.concept: Chain of Thought (CoT) asks Claude to write out its reasoning step by step before giving the final answer. This isn't decoration — Claude's reasoning quality genuinely improves when it 'shows its work', because each output token influences the next.
body_en.analogy: Like a math exam requiring you to show your work, not just the answer. Writing steps isn't just for the teacher to check — the process itself helps you catch calculation errors. Same for Claude: skipping steps leads to mistakes, writing them out improves accuracy.

diagram:
flowchart LR
    A([Question]) --> B[Analyze conditions]
    B --> C[Eliminate options]
    C --> D[Verify]
    D --> E([Final answer])
